onChange.script:
SerialNumber = self.props.text
	if SerialNumber=='':
		return 
	system.perspective.print("serial num --> %s"%SerialNumber)
	wsId=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId
	wsName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation.upper()
	wsName='LAQG02'
	wsId=331
	if (wsName.upper()!='LAQG02'.upper()):
		message = "OIL Calibration can only be done from LAQG02"
		state = "error"
		self.props.text=''
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
		return
	system.perspective.print(wsId)
	data = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/ITSupport/rePrint/qgOilSerialVal",{"SerialNumber":SerialNumber})
	if str(data) == '0':
		message = "Either Serial Number is Invalid or AS per SOP oil filling calibration can only be done for Already oil filled Serial Number."
		state = "error"
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
		self.props.text=''
		
	else:
		message = "Serial Number Validated for Calibration. Select UserID and Password."
		state = "success"
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")

UserName = self.props.text
	#get GearRation and Fill the next Field
	system.perspective.print("UserName --> %s"%UserName)
	data = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/ITSupport/rePrint/authenticateUser",{"User":UserName})
	if str(data) == '0':
		message = "You Dont have access for Oil Calibration, Kindly Contact MES Support Team"
		state = "warning"
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
		self.getSibling("txtPass").props.text = ''
		self.getSibling("txtPass").props.enabled = False
		self.props.text=''	
	else:
		self.getSibling("txtPass").props.enabled=True

password='Vecv123'
	lblPass=self.props.text
	if(lblPass!=password):
		message = "Wrong Password , Please Enter correct Password"
		state = "error"
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
		self.props.text = ''
		self.getSibling("Button").props.enabled=False

props.text:
1. Select a serial number that has already been oil-filled.
2. Scan the serial number at the Quality Gate (QG) to check its status (OK) and oil quantity.
3. If the status and quantity are OK as per the RA-CODE, use this unit for the calibration check.
4. Scan the serial number in the area below.
5. Enter the user ID and password provided by the MES team.
6. Click the Apply button.
7. Now, refill the same serial number using the oil filling machine.
8. Measure the amount poured out and initiate the calibration check.
9. Return the dispensed oil back into the oil drum.
10. Once calibration is successful, scan the serial number again at the Quality Gate.
11. At the Quality Gate, validate the second oil fill status and the displayed oil quantity.

config.script:
"""
		    Written By: Aniket Sagar
		    Written Date: 02/02/2025
		    Purpose: Oil Filling Reset 
	"""
	try:
		serialNumber = self.parent.getChild("FlexContainer").getChild("txtSerialNumber").props.text
		system.perspective.print("serialNumber == %s" % serialNumber)
		UserName = self.parent.getChild("FlexContainer_0").getChild("txtUser").props.text
		system.perspective.print("UserName == %s" % UserName)
		# Get User ID
		getUserID = system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/ITSupport/rePrint/getUsertoSave', {'UserName': UserName})
		system.perspective.print("UserID == %s" % getUserID)
		currWs=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId
		if(currWs != 331):
			message = "Calibration Activity can be done only from LAQG02"
			state = "Error"
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", 
			                                    "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup", "", "", "", "")
		else:
			BOMNumber = serialNumber.split('-')[1]
			Status = 3
			params={"WorkStationName":324,"SerialNumber":serialNumber,"BOMNumber":BOMNumber,"CreatedBy":getUserID,"Status":Status}
			message = "Provided Serial Number set for Oil Calibration"
			state = "info"
			system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/ITSupport/StationStatus",{"WorkStationName":324,"SerialNumber":serialNumber,"BOMNumber":BOMNumber,"CreatedBy":1,"Status":int(Status)})
			
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
		self.parent.getChild("FlexContainer").getChild("txtSerialNumber").props.text=''
		self.parent.getChild("FlexContainer_0").getChild("txtUser").props.text=''
		self.parent.getChild("FlexContainer_0").getChild("txtPass").props.text=''
	except Exception as e:
	    # Log the error and show an error popup
	    system.perspective.print("Error: %s" % str(e))
	    message = "An error occurred: %s" % str(e)
	    state = "error"
	    Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", 
	                                        "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup", "", "", "", "")

onChange.script:
SerialNumber = self.props.text
	if SerialNumber=='':
		return 
	system.perspective.print("serial num --> %s"%SerialNumber)
	wsId=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId
	system.perspective.print("wsId= %s"%wsId)
	wsName=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStation.upper()
	system.perspective.print("wsName= %s"%wsName)
	#wsId=331
	data = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/ITSupport/rePrint/qgReprintValidation",{"SerialNumber":SerialNumber,"WorkStationId":wsId})
	if str(data) != '2':
		message = "Either Serial Number is Invalid or AS per SOP Reprint can be given for already completed serial Number."
		state = "error"
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
		self.props.text=''
		
	else:
		message = "Serial Number Validated for Reprint. Select UserID and Password."
		state = "success"
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")

UserName = self.props.text
	#get GearRation and Fill the next Field
	system.perspective.print("UserName --> %s"%UserName)
	data = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/ITSupport/rePrint/authenticateUser",{"User":UserName})
	if str(data) == '0':
		message = "You Dont have access for Re-Print, Kindly Contact MES Support Team"
		state = "warning"
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
		self.getSibling("txtPass").props.text = ''
		self.getSibling("txtPass").props.enabled = False
		self.props.text=''	
	else:
		self.getSibling("txtPass").props.enabled=True

password='Vecv123'
	lblPass=self.props.text
	if(lblPass!=password):
		message = "Wrong Password , Please Enter correct Password"
		state = "error"
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
		self.props.text = ''
		self.getSibling("Button").props.enabled=False

config.script:
"""
		    Written By: Aniket Sagar
		    Written Date: 02/02/2025
		    Purpose: Oil Filling Reset 
	"""
	
	try:
		#from java.io import DataOutputStream
		
		#import sys 
		#import datetime
		system.perspective.print("Inside Try at line 12")
		serialNumber = self.parent.getChild("FlexContainer").getChild("txtSerialNumber").props.text
		serialNumber=serialNumber.upper()
		Model = serialNumber.split('-')[1]
		system.perspective.print("serialNumber == %s" % serialNumber)
		UserName = self.parent.getChild("FlexContainer_0").getChild("txtUser").props.text
		system.perspective.print("UserName == %s" % UserName)
		# Get User ID
		getUserID = system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/ITSupport/rePrint/getUsertoSave', {'UserName': UserName})
		system.perspective.print("UserID == %s" % getUserID)
		currWs=self.session.custom.CurrentWorkStationId
		#currWs=332
		line = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/ITSupport/getLine",{"MST_WorkStation_Id":currWs})
		system.perspective.print("line == %s" %line)
		# Fetch printer details
		res = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/WashingMachine/GetPrinterDetails", {'WorkStation': currWs})
		pyres = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(res)
				
		for row in pyres:
		    IP = row["IPAddress"]
		    port = row["Port"]
		
		if(currWs == 331):
			message = "Printer not available for LAQG02"
			state = "Error"
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", 
			                                    "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup", "", "", "", "")
		elif(currWs == 280):
			message = "Printer not available for LAQG01"
			state = "Error"
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", 
						                                    "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup", "", "", "", "")
		elif(currWs == 306 or currWs == 349):  #this is for LAQG03 and TAQG03 
			Project_VECV.Printer.GetPrint.getPrintHub(IP,port,serialNumber,Model)
			message = "Re-Print Given to Respective Printer"
			state = "success"
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", 
								                                    "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup", "", "", "", "")
								                                    
		elif(currWs in  [332,369]):  #this is for PDI
			#today = system.date.now()
			#date= system.date.format(today, "ddMMyy")
			
			Project_VECV.Printer.GetPrint.getPDIPrint(serialNumber,IP,port,line)
			message = "Re-Print Given to PDI Printer"
			state = "success"
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", 
								                                    "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup", "", "", "", "")
		elif(currWs in  [291, 377,356]):  #this is for LAQG04 LAQG05 TAQG01 
			BOMId=system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Rework/getBOMId",{'SerialNumber':serialNumber})
			data = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/getPartNumber",{"MST_WorkStation_Id":currWs,"M_BOM_Id":BOMId})
			partNumber = ''
			partNumber=Model
#			for dt in data:    
#				partNumber = dt['M_MaterialNumber']
			if partNumber != '':
				gearRatio = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/ITSupport/getGearRatio",{"SerialNumber":serialNumber})
				Project_VECV.Printer.GetPrint.getDHPrint(serialNumber,IP,port,partNumber,gearRatio)
				message = "Re-Print Given to PDI Printer"
				state = "success"
				Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", 
									                                    "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup", "", "", "", "")
				system.perspective.print('Print Sent for-----------------> Bom=%s'%partNumber)
			else:
				message = "Part-ID not configured, Contact ME Team"
				state = "error"
				Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", 
									                                    "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup", "", "", "", "")

		elif(currWs in  [338]): 
			BOMId=system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Rework/getBOMId",{'SerialNumber':serialNumber})
			data = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Order/getPartNumber",{"MST_WorkStation_Id":currWs,"M_BOM_Id":BOMId})
			partNumber = ''
			for dt in data:    
				partNumber = dt['M_MaterialNumber']
				if partNumber != '':
					gearRatio = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/ITSupport/getGearRatio",{"SerialNumber":serialNumber})
					Project_VECV.Printer.GetPrint.getTAQG01Print(serialNumber,IP,port,partNumber,gearRatio)
					message = "Re-Print Given to PDI Printer"
					state = "success"
					Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", 
										                                    "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup", "", "", "", "")
				else:
					message = "Part-ID not configured, Contact ME Team"
					state = "error"
					Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", 
										                                    "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup", "", "", "", "")
		                                    
		
								                                    
		
		else:
			message = "Re-Print option Not provided by MES Team for this station."
			state = "error"
			Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", 
								                                    "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup", "", "", "", "")
		self.parent.getChild("FlexContainer").getChild("txtSerialNumber").props.text=''
		self.parent.getChild("FlexContainer_0").getChild("txtUser").props.text=''
		self.parent.getChild("FlexContainer_0").getChild("txtPass").props.text=''
	except Exception as e:
	    # Log the error and show an error popup
	    system.perspective.print("Error: %s" % str(e))
	    message = "An error occurred: %s" % str(e)
	    state = "error"
	    Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", 
	                                        "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup", "", "", "", "")
